steps.canonical_text: Keep the person still and comfortable. Do not move them unless the area is unsafe.
Check that the airway is clear and that they are breathing normally. Reassess every minute.

asset_refs.caption: Open the airway and look for normal breathing
asset_refs.content_description: A responder opening the airway with head tilt and chin lift while checking breathing.

steps.canonical_text: Watch for changes in skin color, sweating, alertness, or speech. Tell emergency services about anything that gets worse.
Note when symptoms started, what changed, and any medications or allergies, so you can share this when help arrives.
Do not give food, drink, or medication if you are unsure of the cause or if they are drowsy. Call emergency services if anything worsens.
